objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: momentum_macd
archetype: momentum_macd
family: momentum
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- macd(fast_period=13, slow_period=33, signal_period=7)
- rsi(period=7)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: macd.macd crosses_above macd.signal and rsi > 40 and rsi < 65
- short: macd.macd crosses_below macd.signal and rsi > 30 and rsi < 60
exit:
- condition: macd.histogram changes sign or rsi > 80 or rsi < 20
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 2.0
tp_atr_mult: 5.5
description: ATR stop-loss (2.0x) and take-profit (5.5x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: Momentum and mean reversion strategies combined with volatility-based risk management can enhance results.
